title: [codereview-pass2-security] coap_dtn.c: s_dtn_mutex added but no lock/unlock in existing deaddrop_post/get or dtn calls; race on buffer state possible
description: P0 security: without locks around lichen_dtn_* and senml calls, concurrent CoAP requests can corrupt count/current_bytes/valid flags. Per next bead for thread-safety. discovered-from:project-LICHEN-atwl. Address all P0-P4 before next logical chunk.
